🎉 Don't forget to favorite for a lower price!

Bring smooth energy to your avatar with the Vibing Idol Emote. This vibing idol emote blends cute emote charm with cool emote style, giving you an idol dance packed with expressive personality. Perfect for anime idol fans, kawaii emote lovers, and anyone who wants an aesthetic dance that stands out. Works as a roblox emote, ugc emote, catalog emote, and fits any avatar animation or character animation setup. A trendy emote that’s great for movement emotes, idle moments, performance emotes, and stylish showcases—your avatar’s new favorite vibe.
